no: Branwen as joinable NPC in BG2 TN Female Human Cleric

conflicts.reason: Install order dependency, not incompatibility. Rjali explicitly detects Branwen BG2 via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches it for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH. Install Rjali AFTER Branwen.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Branwen BG2 NPC mod for players and modders
conflicts.source: Rjali multi.tpa has MOD_IS_INSTALLED check for BRANWEN, then patches its BCS/DLG files for multi-romance support. Designed to work together, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Branwen in BG2. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Branwen if standalone detected.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Branwen BG2 NPC mod for players and modders
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME o#bran.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (removed unrelated Water Gardens reference), 2026-03

sum: A playable modding tutorial NPC mod for BGII!
